purpose: Manages properties for the application, including loading, storing, and retrieving properties from a file located in the user's home directory. It provides methods to get and set properties of various types (String, double, float, int, long) and handles default values if the properties file is empty.

return_value.description: Returns the Properties object containing all key-value pairs

methods.code: public Object get(final String KEY) { return properties.getOrDefault(KEY, ""); }

parameters.name: KEY
parameters.description: The key for which the corresponding value is to be retrieved

return_value.description: Returns the value associated with the key, or an empty string if the key is not found

parameters.name: KEY
parameters.description: The key for which the value is to be set

parameters.name: VALUE
parameters.description: The value to be associated with the key

methods.code: public String getString(final String key) { return properties.getOrDefault(key, "").toString(); }

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key for which the string value is to be retrieved

return_value.description: Returns the string value associated with the key, or an empty string if the key is not found

methods.code: public double getDouble(final String key) { return Double.parseDouble(properties.getOrDefault(key, "0").toString()); }

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key for which the double value is to be retrieved

return_value.description: Returns the double value associated with the key, or 0.0 if the key is not found or conversion fails

methods.code: public float getFloat(final String key) { return Float.parseFloat(properties.getOrDefault(key, "0").toString()); }

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key for which the float value is to be retrieved

return_value.description: Returns the float value associated with the key, or 0.0f if the key is not found or conversion fails

methods.code: public int getInt(final String key) { return Integer.parseInt(properties.getOrDefault(key, "0").toString()); }

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key for which the integer value is to be retrieved

return_value.description: Returns the integer value associated with the key, or 0 if the key is not found or conversion fails

methods.code: public long getLong(final String key) { return Long.parseLong(properties.getOrDefault(key, "0").toString()); }

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key for which the long value is to be retrieved

return_value.description: Returns the long value associated with the key, or 0L if the key is not found or conversion fails

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The Properties object to be populated with default values
